heading: Roles, grouped by what they built

items.description: Direct office operations, HR coordination, and budget tracking; draft institutional documents, housing proposals, and management reports; manage ground rent collections and CRM operations.
Maintain governance standards for a residential and commercial construction company; coordinate statutory filings and liaise with auditors and regulators.
Manage property portfolios and real estate transactions across Greater Accra in compliance with land law; implemented digital systems that improved operational efficiency by 40%.
Provide legal advisory support while completing the transition into the Ghana School of Law Pre-Bar Course.

items.role: Legal Affairs Commissioner & Chief Legal Counsel
items.description: Chair the Legal Affairs Commission; represent Executive, Parliamentary, and Judicial Councils at hearings; advise the Legislative Council on Standing Orders amendments.
Spearheaded the LSU website and Dr. Attakora Legal Tree; coached the delegation to the Sarah F. Kpodo International Moot Court Competition.
Lead community development and advocacy programmes across Greater Accra; built partnerships with 15+ community organisations.
Lead regional student advocacy across 20+ African countries; organise the annual West African Student Leadership Summit for 500+ leaders.
